name: Farmers State Bank
description_short: Marion, IA's Farmers State Bank branch at 1240 8th Ave offers retail banking services for local customers.
description_long:
Farmers State Bank operates a branch location at 1240 8th Ave in Marion, IA, serving the community as a standalone banking facility. The branch provides in-person banking services during its regular business hours. This Marion location is designed to meet the banking needs of local residents and small businesses.

The Marion, IA branch offers personal and business banking services, including checking and savings accounts, loan products, and deposit services. Customers can visit the teller windows or speak with banking representatives about their financial needs. While phone contact information isn't published online, visitors to the Marion location can inquire directly about specific services and account options.

Farmers State Bank serves Marion residents as a convenient banking option on 8th Ave. Visit during posted business hours with your ID and any documents related to your banking needs. This locally-focused institution is committed to serving the Marion community.
services: Personal checking accounts including Rewards Checking (up to 3.50% APY)
Savings accounts and certificates of deposit (11-month CD at 3.60% APY)
Mortgage loans including 30-year fixed (6.000% current rate) and FHLB Rate Relief Program products
Auto loans (as low as 5.95% interest rate)
Home equity loans (as low as 6.95% interest rate)
Business checking accounts with deposit bonus incentives up to $1,000
Commercial lending and business financing solutions
Credit cards with rewards and flexible spending options
Wealth management and retirement planning services
Financial wellness resources and educational content (credit building, retirement planning, homebuying guides)
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by full faith and credit of U.S. Government
Rewards Checking account paying up to 3.50% APY with simple monthly requirements
Access to FHLB Rate Relief Program mortgages with below-market rates for qualifying borrowers
Competitive rates across products: 11-month CDs at 3.60% APY, 30-year mortgages at 6.000%, auto loans as low as 5.95%
Substantial community investment: $275,000+ in 60 non-profits, 2,000+ volunteer hours, 60+ community events
Multiple account access channels: online banking, mobile, business portals, trust/estate planning login
Business checking bonus up to $1,000 for new accounts meeting deposit and transaction requirements
cons: Limited geographic footprint restricted to Iowa, not suitable for customers outside the state seeking full-service banking
Website content does not clearly specify checking account fees, minimum balance requirements, or overdraft policies
No mention of investment brokerage services, stock trading, or insurance products beyond credit insurance implications
Promotional rates and bonuses have unstated eligibility requirements (income thresholds, deposit minimums, transaction requirements not fully detailed)
Limited information on digital-only banking features or comparison to neobank offerings for technology-focused customers
best_for: Iowa residents and business owners seeking relationship-based banking with local decision-making authority
Homebuyers qualifying for FHLB Rate Relief Program mortgages based on income and primary residence requirements
Small to mid-sized Iowa businesses needing commercial checking, lending solutions, and local banking relationships
Savers and retirees in Iowa communities prioritizing FDIC-insured products and wealth management from established institution
diagnosis: Farmers State Bank is best for Iowa residents and small business owners who value community connections, local decision-making, and relationship-based banking from an established FDIC-insured institution. The primary caveat is strict geographic limitation to Iowa operations, making it unsuitable for customers outside the state or those prioritizing national reach and digital-only banking convenience over community relationships.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: Farmers State Bank at 1240 8th Ave, Marion, IA. Convenient retail banking services for Marion residents.
